item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Education Oct 2015 - Jul 2019 > Ph.D. in theoretical physics (summa cum laude) Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research, Germany Humboldt-University Berlin, Germany Sep 2013 - May 2015 > M.Sc. in physics (honors) FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg, Germany University College London, United Kingdom Oct 2010 - Sep 2013 > B.Sc. in physics FAU Erlangen-Nuremberg, Germany Experience since Apr 2021 > Research Scientist Bethge Lab, Tuebingen AI Center, University of Tuebingen, Germany

item.title: Events
item.description: 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 | 2015 | 2014 Upcoming … Past Events 2021 Earth System Analysis Seminar, Potsdam Insitute for Climate Impact Research, Potsdam, Germany, Apr 28, 2021 Collective learning for a sustainable future (Virtual Talk) Cyber Valley Evening Colloquium on Autonomous Systems, University of Stuttgart, Stuttgart, Germany, Apr 27, 2021 Multi-agent Replicator Reinforcement Learning Dynamics (Virtual Talk) abstract

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2021 | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2017 | 2016 In review Taxonomies for structuring models for World-Earth system analysis of the Anthropocene: subsystems, their interactions and social-ecological feedback loops Donges JF, Lucht W, Cornell SE, He itzig J, Barfuss W, Lade SJ, Schlüter M (2018) Earth System Dynamics Discussions doi Peer-reviewed 2021 Dynamical systems as a level of cognitive analysis of multi-agent learning - Algorithmic foundations of temporal-difference learning dynamics Barfuss W (2021) Neural Computing & Applications doi | code | zenodo
